blocks.body: Past Perfect: Questions and Short Answers — Had you...?, Had she...? i krótkie odpowiedzi z had / hadn't.

{"level":"A2–B1","intro":"W pytaniach Past Perfect stawiamy had przed podmiotem: Had + subject + V3?","rules":[{"label":"Had + subject + V3?","color":"emerald","text":"To podstawowy model pytania ogólnego.","example":"Had you finished before 6 p.m.?"},{"label":"Wh-questions","color":"blue","text":"Na początku możesz dodać what, why, where, when albo how long.","example":"Why had she left so early?"},{"label":"Short answers","color":"amber","text":"W krótkich odpowiedziach używaj had albo hadn't.","example":"Yes, I had. / No, they hadn't."}]}

{"title":"1. Podstawowe modele pytań","intro":"Zapamiętaj szyk wyrazów w pytaniach Past Perfect.","items":[{"label":"Yes / No","title":"Had + subject + V3?","subtitle":"Had she arrived before noon?"},{"label":"Wh-question","title":"Wh-word + had + subject + V3?","subtitle":"Why had they left before the end?"},{"label":"Short yes","title":"Yes, ... had.","subtitle":"Yes, I had. / Yes, he had."},{"label":"Short no","title":"No, ... hadn't.","subtitle":"No, we hadn't. / No, she hadn't."}]}

{"title":"2. Kiedy zadajemy takie pytania","sections":[{"label":"Wcześniejsza czynność","color":"emerald","description":"Pytaj, czy czynność wydarzyła się przed innym wydarzeniem w przeszłości.","examples":[{"en":"Had they left before the rain started?","ua":"Czy ich wyjście wydarzyło się wcześniej?"},{"en":"Had you met him before that day?","ua":"Czy było wcześniejsze spotkanie?"}]},{"label":"Przed pewnym momentem w przeszłości","color":"blue","description":"Pytaj, czy rezultat był już gotowy w tym momencie.","examples":[{"en":"Had she finished the report by Friday?","ua":"Czy raport był gotowy do tego momentu?"},{"en":"Had you packed everything by 8 a.m.?","ua":"Czy wszystko było już przygotowane?"}]},{"label":"Przyczyna albo wyjaśnienie","color":"amber","description":"Wh-questions pomagają znaleźć przyczynę wcześniejszej czynności.","examples":[{"en":"Why had he changed his mind before the meeting?","ua":"Pytanie dotyczy wcześniejszej przyczyny."},{"en":"Why had they never visited that place before?","ua":"Mówiący chce poznać tło sytuacji."}]},{"label":"Krótkie odpowiedzi","color":"violet","description":"Odpowiadaj krótko, gdy pełne zdanie nie jest potrzebne.","examples":[{"en":"Had you seen the film before? Yes, I had.","ua":"Tutaj wystarczy krótka odpowiedź."},{"en":"Had she called before lunch? No, she hadn't.","ua":"W odpowiedzi użyj had albo hadn't."}]}]}

{"title":"3. Szyk wyrazów","intro":"Zobacz, gdzie stoi had w różnych typach pytań.","rows":[{"en":"Had you finished before the teacher arrived?","ua":"had + you + finished","note":"pytanie ogólne"},{"en":"Had she ever seen snow before that trip?","ua":"had + she + ever seen","note":"pytanie z ever"},{"en":"Why had they left so early?","ua":"why + had + they + left","note":"wh-question"},{"en":"Had we met before? Yes, we had.","ua":"had ... ? / yes, ... had","note":"krótka odpowiedź"}],"warning":"Nie mów Did you had finished? W Past Perfect czasownik pomocniczy to już had."}

{"title":"4. Krótkie podsumowanie","items":["Pytania Past Perfect = Had + subject + V3?","Wh-questions mają schemat Wh-word + had + subject + V3?","W krótkich odpowiedziach używaj had albo hadn't.","Nie dodawaj did, bo ten czas ma już swój czasownik pomocniczy."]}
